skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem: The table shows the amount of time, in minutes, it took Daniela to complete each of 5 tasks in a project: Task I — 4 minutes; Task II — 7 minutes; Task III — 10 minutes; Task IV — 12 minutes; Task V — 17 minutes. What was the mean time, in minutes, for Daniela to complete a task for this project?
rationale: The correct answer is 10. The mean of a data set is the sum of the values divided by the number of values. The sum of the times is 4 + 7 + 10 + 12 + 17 = 50, and there are 5 tasks, so the mean is 50 divided by 5 = 10.
